translations.de: Es tut mir leid, das ist heute unmöglich.
translations.vi: Xin lỗi, hôm nay không thể.
translations.hi: माफ़ कीजिए, आज यह संभव नहीं है.
translations.nb: Beklager, det er umulig i dag.
translations.id: Maaf, itu tidak mungkin hari ini.
translations.sv: Tyvärr, det är omöjligt i dag.
translations.ro: Îmi pare rău, astăzi este imposibil.
translations.cs: Je mi líto, dnes je to nemožné.
translations.da: Beklager, det er umuligt i dag.
translations.ja: すみませんが、今日は無理です。

tokens.explanation: Adjectival interjection expressing apology; stands alone as an utterance.
Clitic subject pronoun with elision before a vowel; refers to a situation.
3rd person singular present of 'être' used as the copula linking subject and predicate.
Predicate adjective stating the property attributed via the copula.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; specifies the time.

sentences.target: On pense que c'est impossible sans voiture.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ pɑ̃s kə sɛ ɛ̃pɔsibl sɑ̃ vwatyʁ/

translations.fr: On pense que c'est impossible sans voiture.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ pɑ̃s kə sɛ ɛ̃pɔsibl sɑ̃ vwatyʁ/
translations.en: We think it's impossible without a car.
translations.es: Creemos que es imposible sin coche.
translations.de: Wir denken, dass es ohne Auto unmöglich ist.
translations.it: Pensiamo che sia impossibile senza auto.
translations.yue: 我哋覺得冇車就做唔到。
translations.ru: Мы считаем, что без машины это невозможно.
translations.pt: Achamos que é impossível sem carro.
translations.he: אנחנו חושבים שזה בלתי אפשרי בלי רכב.
translations.tr: Araba olmadan bunun imkansız olduğunu düşünüyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi nghĩ là không thể nếu không có ô tô.
translations.ar: نعتقد أن ذلك مستحيل بدون سيارة.
translations.nl: We denken dat het zonder auto onmogelijk is.
translations.uk: Ми вважаємо, що без автомобіля це неможливо.
translations.hu: Úgy gondoljuk, autó nélkül ez lehetetlen.
translations.hi: हम सोचते हैं कि बिना कार के यह असंभव है.
translations.pl: Uważamy, że bez samochodu to niemożliwe.
translations.el: Πιστεύουμε ότι είναι αδύνατο χωρίς αυτοκίνητο.
translations.nb: Vi mener det er umulig uten bil.
translations.id: Kami pikir itu tidak mungkin tanpa mobil.
translations.sv: Vi tycker att det är omöjligt utan bil.
translations.ro: Credem că este imposibil fără mașină.
translations.cs: Myslíme si, že je to bez auta nemožné.
translations.da: Vi mener, det er umuligt uden bil.
translations.fi: Mielestämme se on mahdotonta ilman autoa.
translations.ja: 私たちは車がなければ不可能だと思います。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun functioning as the grammatical subject.
3rd person singular present; main verb of the matrix clause.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a finite complement clause.
Clitic subject pronoun with elision before vowel in the subordinate clause.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject pronoun to the predicate.
Predicate adjective within the subordinate clause.
Preposition expressing absence or lack.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'sans'.

sentences.target: Ce jeu est impossible pour moi.

translations.fr: Ce jeu est impossible pour moi.
translations.en: This game is impossible for me.
translations.es: Este juego es imposible para mí.
translations.de: Dieses Spiel ist für mich unmöglich.
translations.it: Questo gioco è impossibile per me.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个游戏对我来说太难了。
translations.yue: 呢隻遊戲對我嚟講根本玩唔到。
translations.ru: Эта игра мне не по силам.
translations.pt: Este jogo é impossível para mim.
translations.vi: Trò chơi này đối với tôi là không thể.
translations.nl: Dit spel is onmogelijk voor mij.
translations.uk: Ця гра мені не під силу.
translations.hi: यह खेल मेरे लिए असंभव है.
translations.pl: Ta gra jest dla mnie nie do przejścia.
translations.el: Αυτό το παιχνίδι είναι αδύνατο για μένα.
translations.nb: Dette spillet er umulig για meg.
translations.sv: Det här spelet är omöjligt för mig.
translations.ro: Jocul acesta este imposibil pentru mine.
translations.da: Dette spil er umuligt for mig.
translations.ja: このゲームは私には無理です。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner modifying the noun 'jeu'.
Common noun; head of the subject noun phrase.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective describing the subject.
Preposition introducing a complement indicating beneficiary/pertinence.
Stressed 1st person singular pronoun; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Tu dis toujours que c'est impossible.

translations.fr: Tu dis toujours que c'est impossible.
translations.de: Du sagst immer, dass es unmöglich ist.
translations.ru: Ты всегда говоришь, что это невозможно.
translations.pt: Você sempre diz que é impossível.
translations.he: אתה תמיד אומר שזה בלתי אפשרי.
translations.tr: Sen hep bunun imkansız olduğunu söylüyorsun.
translations.vi: Bạn lúc nào cũng nói là không thể.
translations.ar: أنت تقول دائمًا إن هذا مستحيل.
translations.nl: Jij zegt altijd कि het onmogelijk is.
translations.uk: Ти завжди кажеш, що це неможливо.
translations.hu: Mindig azt mondod, hogy ez lehetetlen.
translations.hi: तुम हमेशा कहते हो कि यह असंभव है.
translations.el: Πάντα λες ότι αυτό είναι αδύνατο.
translations.nb: Du sier alltid at det er umulig.
translations.sv: Du säger alltid att det är omöjligt.
translations.cs: Ty vždy říkáš, že je to nemožné.
translations.da: Du siger altid, at det er umuligt.
translations.fi: Sanot aina, että se är mahdotonta.

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun.
2nd person singular present; main verb of the clause.
Adverb of frequency modifying the verb 'dis'.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a complement clause.
Clitic subject pronoun with elision before vowel in the subordinate clause.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject pronoun and the predicate.
Predicate adjective within the complement clause.
